ValidationRule.description: Don't let change Sale Division For Managers.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISCHANGED( SalesDivision__c ), OR(Profile.Name = 'Sales Manager (MENA)', Profile.Name = 'Sales Manager (KLW)', Profile.Name = 'Sales Manager (EU)', Profile.Name = 'Sales Manager (EU&Africa)', Profile.Name = 'Sales Manager (ETA)', Profile.Name = 'Sales Manager (CU)', Profile.Name = 'Sales Manager (CIS)', Profile.Name = 'Sales Manager (America)' ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You can't change sale division for Sale Managers. If it necessary required, please disable validation rule.
